description: Fixture briefs for Task 6 direction-picker tests. Each maps a realistic intake to the expected direction. Used by pickDirection.test.ts to verify classification accuracy (pass threshold: ≥6 of 8 core fixtures match).

brief.oneSentence: We build reasoning benchmarks for frontier AI labs.
brief.audience: AI safety researchers, ML engineers at labs

fixtures.rationale: Tech/AI/research with quiet-and-rigorous tone. Zero-point's core territory.

brief.oneSentence: A debugger for distributed systems that shows causality, not stack traces.

fixtures.rationale: Dev tool, serious + clean + technical. Zero-point's typographic discipline fits.

brief.oneSentence: Computational biology research group at UCSF studying protein folding.

fixtures.rationale: Academic research, restrained-and-credible tone. Zero-point signals seriousness.

brief.oneSentence: Film wedding photographer based in Oaxaca, shooting on medium format.
brief.audience: couples planning destination weddings, art directors

fixtures.rationale: Image-forward portfolio, unhurried tone, directly cites editorial reference sites.

brief.oneSentence: A 24-seat tasting-menu restaurant exploring fermented Pacific Northwest produce.

fixtures.rationale: High-end restaurant, considered + intimate + crafted. Serif-forward editorial territory.

brief.oneSentence: Essays on architecture, memory, and the cities we inherit.

fixtures.rationale: Writer portfolio, measured-literary tone. Classic editorial aesthetic.

brief.oneSentence: An independent branding studio for companies that refuse to look like everyone else.

fixtures.rationale: Agency, raw-and-confrontational tone, typographic-first. Brutalist center of mass.

brief.oneSentence: A two-person studio making unmarketable experimental games.

fixtures.rationale: Experimental studio, weird-abrasive-honest. Brutalist allows the unfiltered voice.

brief.oneSentence: A quarterly zine on typography, labor, and obsolete technology.

fixtures.rationale: Zine about typography itself — brutalist is self-referential and earned here.

brief.oneSentence: Somatic coaching for people untangling burnout and rebuilding pace.

fixtures.rationale: Coaching, gentle-grounded tone. Organic's warmth is the right register.

brief.oneSentence: Sourdough and seasonal pastries from a single-oven bakery in the neighborhood.
brief.audience: neighbors, people who stop in Saturday mornings

fixtures.rationale: Neighborhood small-biz, handmade-and-warm. Organic aesthetic fits the artisan register.

brief.oneSentence: Mysore-style ashtanga in a converted greenhouse studio.
brief.audience: committed yoga practitioners, beginners who want mentorship

fixtures.rationale: Wellness studio, warm-rooted-embodied. Organic's gradients + hand-drawn energy.
Ambiguous between editorial (book-author polish) and organic (warm + playful). Either acceptable.

brief.oneSentence: A newsletter on systems programming for people who read kernel source for fun.
brief.audience: kernel devs, OS nerds, low-level engineers

fixtures.rationale: Technical newsletter — zero-point's rigor OR brutalist's typographic honesty both defensible.
Under-specified brief. Default to zero-point (flagship) rather than forcing a warmer direction without signal.

brief.oneSentence: Boutique interior studio balancing brutalist architecture and heirloom textiles.

fixtures.rationale: Conflicting: brutalist architectural refs + warm-tactile-heirloom textiles. Editorial best handles the tension; organic or brutalist also defensible.

required.description: Of the 12 non-edge fixtures (zp/ed/br/or × 3), at least 9 must match expectedDirection.

tolerant.description: Of the 4 edge fixtures, the picker must return either expectedDirection OR one of allowAlternatives for all.
